gmStry.hdln: Neto hat trick sees Chelsea cruise to win at Hull
gmStry.desc: Pedro Neto scored a hat trick as Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior's first return to former club Hull ended in a comfortable 4-0 victory in the fourth round of the FA Cup.
